ModDescription: Lights up the battlefield tiles that hide Move-Find treasure so you never walk past a hidden item, and hides each tile once its treasure is taken -- both within the battle and permanently on later visits once you have collected it and won the fight. Optionally gives every standard player job the Treasure Hunter ability so anyone can pick treasures up (off by default; needs the FFT Ivalice Chronicles Mod Loader; enemy humans of those jobs get it too). In-process runtime; all three behaviors toggle in the mod config.
